name: Hedgerow Jam
recipeIngredient: 450 grams Bramley apples (or other cooking apples)
450 grams blueberries (or 225 grams blueberries and 225 grams elderberries)
recipeInstructions:
1. In a preserving pan, stew the chopped apples with 425 milliliters of water for 15 minutes until soft.
2. Add the blackberries, blueberries, and elderberries (if using), finely grated orange rind, and juice, as well as cinnamon; cook for 10 minutes until the berries start to break up.
3. Gradually add the sugar over a low heat, stirring until dissolved. Remove the cinnamon stick and boil rapidly for 15-20 minutes, or until a good set is obtained.
4. Pour into hot sterilized jars, cover, and label.
